description: EasyPost provides shipping and logistics APIs for buying labels, rating shipments, tracking packages, managing carrier accounts, and related parcel workflows. Its public developer documentation centers on the EasyPost API and official client libraries.
summary: EasyPost exposes a documented REST shipping API at `https://api.easypost.com/v2`, authenticated with EasyPost API keys via HTTP Basic auth; no public GraphQL, MCP server, or official CLI surface was found.
